headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -68.2)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 21% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate today with 149 quotes and an unusually high proportion of strong-intensity voices (116 out of 149), driving the score to 54.7 — people are venting with real force.
• This frustration level sits in the upper third of the 186-day range, well above yesterday's near-neutral 5.9, marking a sharp single-day spike.
• Fears and Optimism are both subdued and largely unchanged from yesterday, sitting toward the lower end of their historical ranges.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
